title: Sick Compass
body:
A resource pack that improves the looks of compass of the vanilla compass and some other mods compasses!

 

Please leave your feedback of which mods should i add support

 

Mods currently suported: 

-[Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass);

-[Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass);

 

Can i use this in my modpack? Of course! Just credit me please!

Can you update/backport to X version? I might do that if i find the time to do it, so no need to ask for it, it'll happen when it happen!
